news.title: Bitcoin takes back seat to stablecoins and tokenization among financial advisors: Bitwise CIO
news.summary: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan said financial advisors are now showing more interest in stablecoins and tokenization than bitcoin.

news.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX IPO could become bitcoin’s latest headwind
news.summary: SpaceX setting aside up to 30% of IPO shares for retail investors could prompt investors to exit crypto assets like Bitcoin and Ethereum.

news.title: Solana Exchange Raydium Hit With $1.34 Million Exploit as DeFi Attacks Grow
news.summary: Solana-based decentralized exchange Raydium will repay the funds swiped in the $1.34 million exploit using its treasury.

news.title: Tether, Nvidia and Amazon Back Humanoid Robotics Firm NEURA in $1.4 Billion Funding Round
news.summary: Stablecoin giant Tether led a massive Series C round for German robotics firm NEURA, which will embed crypto payment tools and edge AI.

news.title: The Internet Is Furious at Anthropic After Claude Fable 5 Release
